name: convergent
statement_text: A square matrix A is ‘convergent’ if limn→∞ An = 0.

variables.name: A^n
variables.definition: The nth power of the matrix A

preamble: The subsection discusses properties of powers of a matrix A, focusing on when the sequence of powers is bounded and when it converges to zero. The definitions are given in terms of matrix norms and limits.
